meanings.definition: a flat (usually rectangular) container for a letter, thin package, etc.
a curve that is tangent to each of a family of curves
a natural covering (as by a fluid)
examples: the spacecraft detected an envelope of gas around the comet

meanings.definition: the maximum operating capability of a system (especially an aircraft)
examples: test pilots try to push the envelope

meanings.definition: the bag containing the gas in a balloon
